problem_statement: Manual pull request reviews are time-consuming, inconsistent, and error-prone, creating development bottlenecks while still missing latent defects; the paper builds an agentic AI system to automate and enhance code review of PRs.
magnitude_evidence: Modern software teams often spend a significant amount of their development time on manual pull request reviews, yet still miss latent defects that lead to post deployment failures
insufficiency_evidence: static analysis tools (SAST) like SonarQube ... fundamentally lack contextual understanding. They operate on fixed rules, resulting in high false-positive rates and an inability to detect complex logical flaws
solution_mechanisms: RAG PR-title validation against company rules
